//: VSA architecture protection rules. See bottom of file for the per-rule rationale.

rules.//max-lines: VSA: every source file must stay <= 150 lines (excluding blank lines and comments) so each unit stays readable and reviewable. Currently 'warn' because legacy modules still exceed it; flip to 'error' once the cleanup pass is complete.

no-restricted-syntax.message: VSA: process.env.* is forbidden outside src/config/api.config.js. Import the config instead.

rules.//no-restricted-imports: VSA: forbid deep-imports into a feature from outside that feature. Same-feature imports use './...' or '../<own-subdir>/...' and are unaffected. Cross-feature barrel imports are blocked by the 'features/**' override below.

patterns.message: VSA: do not deep-import into a feature. Use the feature barrel: '<scope>/features/<slice>'.

overrides.//: VSA: code inside a feature slice may only import from (a) its own slice, (b) shared/*, or (c) framework libraries. Importing a sibling feature — even via its barrel — breaks slice isolation. Patterns below cover both barrel ('../<other>', '../../<other>') and deep ('../<other>/components/X', '../../<other>/services/Y') sibling imports.

patterns.message: VSA: a feature may only import from (1) itself ('./...' or '../<own-subdir>/...'), (2) shared/*, or (3) external libraries. Move cross-cutting code to shared/.

paths.name: axios
paths.message: VSA: components are presentational. Move HTTP calls to a feature service or hook.

patterns.message: VSA: do not deep-import into a feature. Use the feature barrel: '<scope>/features/<slice>'.

no-restricted-globals.name: fetch
no-restricted-globals.message: VSA: components must not call fetch. Use a feature service or hook.
